REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (463 Eureka St., San Francisco, Ca 94114)
Off Calendar Jan-06-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for Clyde Martin Jr.

The sale is confirmed at $730,000.00 as overbid and is based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the petition (subject to a written order). No additional bond is required. Ms. Ng is to prepare the revised order.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (463 Eureka St., San Francisco, Ca 94114)
Off Calendar Dec-20-2010 Continued To Jan-03-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for Clyde Martin, Jr.

Ms. Ng stated that she did not have the Inventory and Appraisal. The Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property was continued to January 3, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
